text.title: Frontend Design Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the frontend-design methodology.

example.title: SaaS dashboard variant comparison
example.narrative: B2B analytics dashboard, React + Tailwind. Fixed requirements: dense data, light + dark theme, desktop-first. Four variants generated: (1) sidebar-nav + table-dense, (2) topbar-nav + card-spacious, (3) sidebar-nav + card-mid, (4) topbar-nav + table-dense. Playwright renders each at 1440×900 with realistic seed data. Side-by-side screenshots reviewed; founder picks (1) for density. Tokens extracted: 24 primitives + 18 semantics. Storybook 7.6.20 pinned with @storybook/react-vite + a11y addon. Button component scaffolded with story + test. Spec captured in frontend-spec.md.
example.artifact: frontend-spec.md + variants/v1..v4 screenshots + tokens/{primitive,semantic}.json + storybook scaffold.
